name: CartCrossSell
usage_hint: Self-contained cross-sell/upsell inside the cart drawer. Reads config from $cartConfig.upsells, evaluates triggers against $cartLines, fetches recommended products, and self-hides when no triggers match. No external rules needed.
when_to_use: Inside DrawerShell to show product recommendations based on cart contents. Config comes from commerce_config.upsells — the island is fully reactive to cart state changes.
when_not_to_use: Outside cart context. For static product grids use EditorialProductGrid or ProductCarousel.
anti_patterns: Passing product data via data-props (use commerce_config.upsells instead — the island reads from $cartConfig)
Using hidden class + rules for visibility (the island self-manages show/hide)
Placing outside DrawerShell (needs cart state subscription)

examples.label: Default — reads upsells from store config, no props needed
